title: Councillor opens fraud case against Dr Beyers Naudé Municipality
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Today, 4 February, Councillor Xolile Galada, accompanied by Councillor Nathan Jacobs, opened a fraud case against the Dr Beyers Naudé Municipality.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Today, 4 February, Councillor Xolile Galada, accompanied by Councillor Nathan Jacobs, opened a fraud case against the Dr Beyers Naudé Municipality."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The allegations of fraud relate to the security tenders that have recently been advertised by the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Galada submitted prima facie evidence implicating the Municipal Manager, his personal assistant, and the municipality's supply chain manager in fraudulent activities.","html":"Galada submitted prima facie evidence implicating the Municipal Manager, his personal assistant, and the municipality's supply chain manager in fraudulent activities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to him, this instance of fraud can be linked to the findings of a 2018 HAWKS investigation into irregularities at the municipality's supply chain division.","html":"According to him, this instance of fraud can be linked to the findings of a 2018 HAWKS investigation into irregularities at the municipality's supply chain division."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's edition of the Graaff-Reinet Advertiser.","html":"Read more in this week's edition of the Graaff-Reinet Advertiser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Councillor opens fraud case against Dr Beyers Naudé Municipality
